changelog: Feature: Tooltip system — helpful hover tooltips on buttons, icons, and nav items throughout the UI
Feature: Tooltip toggle in Settings > General > Interface — enabled by default, persisted in localStorage
Feature: Storage Limit tab in Client Settings — view and manage per-client storage quotas directly from the endpoint settings page
Fix: Service startup now retries DB connection up to 30s to survive slow MariaDB boot
Fix: Systemd service hardened with Requires=mariadb.service and network-online.target dependency
Fix: Express serves frontend static files (eliminates dependency on Vite dev server across reboots)
UX: Endpoints list customer column is now read-only — edit via device settings or Customers page
